## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What is the current limitation?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why are they insufficient?

## Additional context

Any other relevant information, links, or examples from other DDS implementations.
